channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Billy Corgan Has a Theory About Robots, Weed, and the Future of America
item.description: 🤖🌿 Billy Corgan's latest theory is wild! Are robots and weed the key to America's future? 🤔🎶 #MusicNews

item.title: Charli XCX Commemorates Spring and Summer in High Fashion ‘SS26’ Video
item.description: 🌸🌞 Dive into @charli_xcx's stylish 'SS26' video celebrating the seasons! Watch now for a dose of high-fashion fun! 💃 #CharliXCX #SS26 #NewMusic

item.title: KATSEYE’s 2026 “WILDWORLD TOUR” Is Sold Out — Here’s How You Can Still Get Tickets
item.description: 🎉 Score a spot at the sold-out KATSEYE “WILDWORLD TOUR” 🌍🎶 Snag last-minute tickets now! #livemusic #dontmissout

item.title: See First Trailer for Questlove’s Earth, Wind & Fire Doc Featuring Michelle and Barack Obama
item.description: 🌟 Groove along with the Obamas in the trailer for the Earth, Wind & Fire doc by Questlove! 🎶🔥 #MusicLegends #DocumentaryDrop

item.title: Spotify Announces “Reserved” Ticket Program for Superfans
item.description: 🌟 Calling all music superstars! 🌟 Spotify's new "Reserved" ticket program is here to make your concert dreams come true! 🎶✨ #MusicNews
